agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: ZIP codes with higher housing costs reflect higher operational cost structures, so nonprofits running special events in these regions spend more on venue rentals and event direct costs.
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Harrison & Wolch (1998) discuss spatial constraints and cost factors for urban nonprofits.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant positive correlation was found. Event expenses are slightly higher in high-cost ZIP codes, indicating that local real estate prices scale up event production overhead.
